nasb.text: During supper, the devil having already put into the heart of Judas Iscariot, the son of Simon, to betray Him,

esv.text: During supper, when the devil had already put it into the heart of Judas Iscariot, Simon’s son, to betray him,

ccb.text: 吃晚饭的时候，魔鬼已经把出卖耶稣的念头放在加略人西门的儿子犹大的心里。

csbs.text: 晚餐的时候，魔鬼已经把出卖耶稣的念头放在加略人西门的儿子犹大的心里。
